_instructions.purpose: This is the MASTER CONFIG file. The website reads this to know which sessions exist.
how_to_add_session: 4. Edit the new session.json — change id, number, title, slides, images, quiz etc.
5. Add the session entry below in the 'sessions' array
6. Export PPT slides as JPG into sessions/session-4/slides/
Done! The website will automatically show the new session.

sessions/.session-N/: Copy structure for each new session

site.name: Vidya STEAM
site.subtitle: Tinkering Lab for Grades 5–9
site.description: A hands-on STEAM education program where kids learn electronics, Arduino, robotics, IoT, and 3D printing by building real projects.

sessions._note: Path to this session's JSON file

lab_tools.name: IoT
lab_tools.desc: Link your device to the internet

lab_culture.title: Fail Loudly
lab_culture.desc: If something doesn't work, share it. Everyone learns from your mistake.

lab_culture.title: Team First
lab_culture.desc: No lone wolves. Build together, debug together, celebrate together.

lab_culture.title: Ask Questions
lab_culture.desc: There are no dumb questions. Curiosity is your biggest tool here.

lab_culture.title: Iterate Always
lab_culture.desc: Version 1 is never the best. Improve, improve, improve.

lab_culture.title: Leave it Better
lab_culture.desc: Clean your workspace. Put components back. Respect shared tools.

lab_culture.title: Support Each Other
lab_culture.desc: If you figure something out, help the person next to you.
